evals.prompt: I am in a Next.js repo and want useful skills for performance, testing, and release quality. Find and install only trusted options.
evals.expected_output: Asks install scope first, profiles repo, generates targeted queries, applies trust filter, asks keep choices, and installs confirmed picks.
expectations: install scope prompt appears first with project-only default
queries are repo-aware and not generic only
final output includes deterministic install commands

evals.prompt: For this Express API repo, I need skills for auth hardening and rate limiting. Keep only trusted candidates.
evals.expected_output: Prioritizes security workflow skills with trust reasons and fit scoring.
expectations: cards include fit score and verdict
assistant asks Keep selection per query

evals.prompt: This data pipeline repo uses Python and dbt. Help me find skills for reliability, testing, and incident triage.
evals.expected_output: Generates workflow-specific queries and proposes a complementary bundle.

evals.prompt: In our React Native app repo, help me find skills for release QA and crash triage, then install project-only.
evals.expected_output: Uses mobile-relevant discovery and installs in project scope.
expectations: scope choice is honored as project-only
verification includes npx skills list and npx skills check

evals.prompt: I have a monorepo with web, api, and workers. Find skills for CI governance and code quality and let me choose.
evals.expected_output: Profiles monorepo complexity and surfaces trust-eligible CI/code quality skills.
expectations: applies trust gate before presenting options

evals.prompt: We are migrating a legacy Rails service to Node. Find trusted skills to plan safe migration slices and validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Recommends migration and verification skills with explicit trust justification.
expectations: handles legacy constraints in repo profile
final report includes retry commands for failures
